base_context.description: The next run will be this leader/base config plus ONLY the JSON changes returned by the advisor.

expected_direction: improve selected objective by changing entry quality/profile selection without starving trades
expected_effect: Expected to create a clean attribution sample for a dormant pin-avoid profile with minimal disruption to the current leader. Success requires positive standalone PnL or clear tail reduction, total net profit retained at >=98% of run_001, no increase in slow >=12h trades, and no material cannibalization of pullback_long, charm_pin_pullback_long, squeeze_long, or charm_wall_breakaway_long. Main tradeoff is that the new profile may be unreachable or may steal a few profitable charm/pin continuation entries.
label: charm-wall-pin-avoid-activation-probe
rationale: The leader remains strong, but repeated squeeze TP probes are now flat and take-profit is novelty-saturated. Direct 1DTE tightening, call-wall loosening, runtime exits, and pullback re-expansion have all hurt risk-adjusted score or profit. The remaining useful research path is profile discovery: all current bad-MAE rows are covered by extended-VWAP/pin-style diagnostics, yet protected extended-VWAP winners make blunt global veto tuning unsafe. Activating one dormant VALID_0DTE pin-avoid profile is a config-only split test that can show whether existing playbook routing separates pin-risk tails better than parent-profile tightening.
